description: Beyond the Veil Patch 11 (5 July 2023) — Hide Casting and Channeling Bars, General Changes and Improvements, Selectable Nametag Changes and Fixes, Controller Changes and Fixes, Combat Balance Changes, General Fixes.

sections.heading: Hide Casting and Channeling Bars

subsections.heading: casting and channeling bars of other players

sections.heading: General Changes and Improvements

items.text: [MOBILE] Login interface now supports autofill via Password Managers

subitems.text: When a zone becomes a backline, all Outposts now automatically change ownership to the zone owner
An attacking Faction that becomes cut off can no longer progress the capture of a zone, even if that Faction holds the majority of Outposts in the zone

items.text: Crystal Arena / 5v5 Crystal League match duration: 25 minutes → 24 minutes

stats.name: Crystal Arena / 5v5 Crystal League match duration

items.text: Guild Finder now accepts custom Discord links

sections.searchable_text: General Changes and Improvements [MOBILE] Login interface now supports autofill via Password Managers Faction Warfare When a zone becomes a backline, all Outposts now automatically change ownership to the zone owner An attacking Faction that becomes cut off can no longer progress the capture of a zone, even if that Faction holds the majority of Outposts in the zone Crystal Arena / 5v5 Crystal League match duration: 25 minutes → 24 minutes Guild Finder now accepts custom Discord links Added avatars for Mists chests

sections.heading: Selectable Nametag Changes and Fixes

subsections.heading: Changes:

items.text: Removed default box around off-screen nametags - now only shown on mouseover or when target is selected
Off-screen nametags now always have some transparency

subsections.searchable_text: Changes: Removed default box around off-screen nametags - now only shown on mouseover or when target is selected Off-screen nametags now always have some transparency

subsections.heading: Fixes:

items.text: Fixed issue where right-clicking nametag selected player (now only activated by left click)
Fixed issue where skillshots could not be cast when clicking on player nametag

subsections.searchable_text: Fixes: Fixed issue where right-clicking nametag selected player (now only activated by left click) Fixed issue where skillshots could not be cast when clicking on player nametag

sections.searchable_text: Selectable Nametag Changes and Fixes Changes: Removed default box around off-screen nametags - now only shown on mouseover or when target is selected Off-screen nametags now always have some transparency Fixes: Fixed issue where right-clicking nametag selected player (now only activated by left click) Fixed issue where skillshots could not be cast when clicking on player nametag

sections.heading: Controller Changes and Fixes

subsections.heading: Changes:

items.text: Items moved via controller now stack by default
Text fields no longer default to input mode when navigated to via controller - added "Input Text" interaction and hint for the confirm button for controllers instead

subsections.searchable_text: Changes: Items moved via controller now stack by default Text fields no longer default to input mode when navigated to via controller - added "Input Text" interaction and hint for the confirm button for controllers instead

subsections.heading: Fixes:

items.text: Fixed issue where it was not possible to interact with the Fort Sterling Marketplace while using a controller
Fixed issue where "Quick Cast on Button Release" did not work with control scheme "Right stick cursor"
Fixed issue where pressing button while walking would spam ground clicks and character would keep moving

subsections.searchable_text: Fixes: Fixed issue where it was not possible to interact with the Fort Sterling Marketplace while using a controller Fixed issue where "Quick Cast on Button Release" did not work with control scheme "Right stick cursor" Fixed issue where pressing button while walking would spam ground clicks and character would keep moving

sections.searchable_text: Controller Changes and Fixes Changes: Items moved via controller now stack by default Text fields no longer default to input mode when navigated to via controller - added "Input Text" interaction and hint for the confirm button for controllers instead Fixes: Fixed issue where it was not possible to interact with the Fort Sterling Marketplace while using a controller Fixed issue where "Quick Cast on Button Release" did not work with control scheme "Right stick cursor" Fixed issue where pressing button while walking would spam ground clicks and character would keep moving

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs

subitems.text: Purge now triggers before the silence
Reverted cleanse logic rework introduced in Patch 10 (i.e. CC effects and debuffs are no longer instantly removed, but cleansed in a fixed tick interval)

subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Arcane Orb (one-handed Arcane Staff) Purge now triggers before the silence The Void (Malevolent Locus) Reverted cleanse logic rework introduced in Patch 10 (i.e. CC effects and debuffs are no longer instantly removed, but cleansed in a fixed tick interval)

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Enchanted Quiver (Bow) Attack Damage Increase: 240% → 220% Magic Arrow (Warbow) Projectile hitbox increased slightly

subsections.heading: Crossbows

subitems.text: Damage Percent basis: Max Health → Current Health

subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Explosive Bolt (all Crossbows) Standtime: 0.3s → 0.2s Projectile Speed: 30m/s → 40m/s Vicious Barrage (Siegebow) Damage Percent basis: Max Health → Current Health

subsections.heading: Maces

subitems.text: Purge now triggers before the silence

subsections.searchable_text: Maces Battle Howl (Heavy Mace) Cooldown: 15s → 18s Purge now triggers before the silence

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Iron Will (all Swords) Energy Cost: 9 (flat) → 10% (of Max Energy) Parry Strike (all Swords) Cooldown: 18s → 16s

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs

subitems.text: Breaks any shields every time it deals damage

subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Fatal Blade (Black Monk Staff) Removed the Slow Breaks any shields every time it deals damage

subsections.heading: Spears

subitems.text: Adjusted Projectile Hitbox, making it less likely to hit close targets behind caster

subsections.searchable_text: Spears Impaler (all Spears) Hit Delay: 0.4s → 0.3s Standtime: 0.8s → 0.65s Spear Throw (Heron Spear) Adjusted Projectile Hitbox, making it less likely to hit close targets behind caster

subsections.heading: Helmets

subitems.text: Fixed bug where it triggered higher Diminishing Returns than intended

subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Block (Soldier Helmet) Channel Duration: 1.75s → 2.5s Electric Discharge (Judicator Helmet) Fixed bug where it triggered higher Diminishing Returns than intended Retaliate (Hunter Hood) Buff Duration: 4s → 3s Stone Skin (all Plate Helmets) Cooldown: 45s → 30s Buff Duration: 7s → 4s

subsections.heading: Armors

subitems.text: Now steals only 50% of the damage dealt to Mobs (Lifesteal vs. players unchanged)

subsections.searchable_text: Armors Life Steal Aura (Hellion Jacket) Now steals only 50% of the damage dealt to Mobs (Lifesteal vs. players unchanged)

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Crush Charge (Duskweaver Boots) Cooldown: 20s → 25s Dodge (all Boots) Cooldown: 25s → 20s Energetic Sprint (all Cloth Sandals) Energy per Tick: 5 → 4 (Total Energy: 20 → 16) Rejuvenating Sprint (all Plate Boots) Heal per Tick: 18 → 14.4 (Total Heal: 72 → 57.6)

subsections.heading: Battlemount Abilities
subsections.searchable_text: Battlemount Abilities Crystal Beam (Roving Bastion) Damage Reduction Debuff: 12% → 15% Damage: 120 → 24

subsections.heading: Miscellaneous

items.text: Cooldown on Spell Change: 10s → 5s (Cooldown on Equipment Change remains 10s)

subsections.searchable_text: Miscellaneous Cooldown on Spell Change: 10s → 5s (Cooldown on Equipment Change remains 10s) Minimum duration before cancel Toggle abilities: 0.5s → 0.75s Channel abilities: 0.3s → 0.75s

subsections.heading: Knightfall Abbey
subsections.searchable_text: Knightfall Abbey Blessing of Compassion 1 Stack Heal: 14% → 10% 1 Stack Heal over time: 7% → 5% Scaling per Stack

sections.heading: General Fixes

subitems.text: Fixed issue where Login UI disappeared if user accepted Close Application prompt
Fixed issue where, when opening world map and clicking a zone while inside Knightfall Abbey, the Knightfall Abbey map would show
Mounts of dismounted players no longer show in overcrowded regions
Fixed Guild Season winner banner animation
Fixed message when trying to place items in food slot

items.text: Crystal League / Arena: Fixed issue where final point rotation of claimed orbs did not count toward final score
Slow effect of Malicious Imp autoattack no longer triggers Diminishing Returns
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where spells could not be interrupted by releasing joystick and moving in same direction as when starting cast
Additional graphical, UI, terrain, audio, animation, and localization fixes
